subject: Add produces_for prompt injection logic to orchestration and SKILL.md
description:
Implement the `produces_for` mechanism that injects producer task results directly into dependent task prompts for richer context than wave-granular merging alone.

**What to implement:**

1. Define `produces_for` field in task JSON schema (in orchestration.md):
   - Array of task IDs that consume this task's output
   - Optional field: tasks without it use wave-granular context only

2. Add injection logic to `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md`:
   - When launching a dependent task, check if any of its blockedBy tasks have `produces_for` pointing to it
   - Read the producer's result file content
   - Inject into task prompt: `## UPSTREAM TASK OUTPUT (Task #{id}: {name})\n{result file content}\n---`
   - Multiple producers injected in task ID order
   - Injection after execution context loading, before codebase exploration
   - If producer result file missing (task failed): inject `## UPSTREAM TASK #{id} FAILED\n{failure summary from task_log.md}`

3. Update `claude/sdd-tools/skills/execute-tasks/SKILL.md`:
   - Add prompt injection step to agent launch procedure
   - Reference orchestration.md for detailed injection format

**Task JSON schema extension:**
```json
{
  "produces_for": ["8", "12"]
}
```

**Pattern reference:** execute-tdd-tasks' `PAIRED TEST TASK OUTPUT` mechanism.

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md` (~611 lines)
- `claude/sdd-tools/skills/execute-tasks/SKILL.md` (~271 lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] `produces_for` field defined in task JSON schema documentation
- [ ] Producer result files injected into dependent task prompts
- [ ] Injection format: `## UPSTREAM TASK OUTPUT (Task #{id}: {name})\n{content}\n---`
- [ ] Multiple producers injected in task ID order
- [ ] Injection happens after context loading, before exploration
- [ ] Tasks without produces_for behave unchanged (wave-granular context only)

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Producer task failed → inject failure notice instead of result
- [ ] Producer result file missing entirely → inject failure notice
- [ ] No produces_for relationships in task set → no injection overhead

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Missing producer result file → log warning, inject failure notice, continue

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify injection format in orchestration.md
• Integration: Validated during end-to-end execution session (Task 15)

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 5.5
